what_it_does: This file is a ledger metadata entry for an image asset: it records the identity, channel, blob reference, MIME type, source label, author session, and creation time for pitch-deck/p-11.jpg, and declares itself a design ground-truth source.
observations: YAML frontmatter carries image ledger fields: id, address, channel, path, blob, mime, name, w, h, source, author_session, created, links.
The image dimensions are recorded as w: 0 and h: 0.
The source field is set to design_source_material and the channel is design-source.
Body text reads 'SOURCE design ground-truth — pitch-deck/p-11.jpg'.
standouts: Width and height are both zero, suggesting missing or unpopulated image metadata.
The file is purely a pointer/provenance record with no embedded image data or descriptive caption.
It explicitly tags the asset as a design-source ground truth.
conventions: Follows a YAML-frontmatter ledger schema for image assets.
Separates machine metadata from a short human-readable source note.
concerns: Zero width/height values may indicate incomplete ingestion or missing metadata validation.
No links or contextual references connect this image to other artifacts.
There is no caption, alt text, or content description for the image itself.
notes: A sparse ledger stub for a pitch-deck image that records provenance and a blob pointer but lacks dimensions, links, and any description of what the image depicts.
questions: Why are the width and height recorded as zero?
What visual content does pitch-deck/p-11.jpg contain?
Is this image intended to be referenced by other design or presentation artifacts?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose is to serve as a design ground-truth source image record; actual content is a metadata stub that points to a blob and records provenance, but it is missing image dimensions and descriptive content, so it only partially fulfills a complete ground-truth record.
apparent_themes: Lightweight ledger metadata over embedded content
intention_signals: The file appears to be trying to register a specific pitch-deck image as a canonical, traceable design-source asset within a larger knowledge or memory system.
contribution: Provides a stable identifier, channel classification, blob pointer, source label, author session, and timestamp for the pitch-deck/p-11 image, which a fused system could use to locate and attribute the asset.
summary_for_embedding: A ledger metadata file for an image asset named pitch-deck/p-11 in the design-source channel, referencing a JPEG blob and recording source, author session, and creation time with zero dimensions and no links.
intention_for_embedding: To catalog a design-source ground-truth image from a pitch deck for retrieval and provenance tracking.
